---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Science — Lucia S. Layritz"
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-header">
  <p class="category">Science</p>
  <h1>Research</h1>
  <p style="max-width:600px; color:#444; margin-top:0.8rem;">
    My research explores how ecosystems recover after disturbances under shifting climates. I combine dynamic vegetation modelling, remote sensing, and statistical approaches to understand resilience and inform climate adaptation strategies.
  </p>
</div>
```

### Publications

```{=html}
<ul class="pub-list">

  <li>
    <span class="pub-year">2025</span>
    Early warning signs for tipping points in systems with non-Gaussian-stable noise.<br>
    <span class="pub-journal">Scientific Reports</span> ·
    <a href="https://www.nature.com/articles/s41598-025-88659-0" target="_blank">doi</a>
  </li>

  <li>
    <span class="pub-year">2025</span>
    Disentangling future effects of climate change and forest disturbance on vegetation composition and land surface properties of the boreal forest.<br>
    <span class="pub-journal">Biogeosciences</span> ·
    <a href="https://bg.copernicus.org/articles/22/3635/2025/" target="_blank">doi</a>
  </li>

  <li>
    <span class="pub-year">2024</span>
    Frost matters: Incorporating late-spring frost in a dynamic vegetation model regulates regional productivity dynamics in European beech forests.<br>
    <span class="pub-journal">Biogeosciences</span> ·
    <a href="https://bg.copernicus.org/articles/21/1355/2024/" target="_blank">doi</a>
  </li>

  <li>
    <span class="pub-year">2022</span>
    Quantifying the impacts of land cover change on gross primary productivity globally.<br>
    <span class="pub-journal">Scientific Reports</span> ·
    <a href="https://www.nature.com/articles/s41598-022-23120-0" target="_blank">doi</a>
  </li>

  <li>
    <span class="pub-year">2021</span>
    The potential of direct steam cracker electrification and carbon capture &amp; utilization via oxidative coupling of methane as decarbonization strategies for the chemical industry.<br>
    <span class="pub-journal">Applied Energy</span> ·
    <a href="https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0306261921005079" target="_blank">doi</a>
  </li>

</ul>
```

### Preprints & Conference Contributions

- Early warning signs of critical transitions — The α-stable case. *arXiv*, 2023. [arXiv:2311.16350](https://arxiv.org/abs/2311.16350)
- Integrating future climate projections into post-fire management: A stochastic decision-support toolbox for adaptation in arid ecosystems. *EGU*, 2026.
- Post-fire recovery and the role of armed conflict in the Eastern Mediterranean — A case study in Lebanon. *EGU General Assembly*, 2025.

[Google Scholar →](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=cACc1A4AAAAJ){target="_blank"}
